LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-17-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Feb-03-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent decree" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
